content: You are a local tool-using agent. Use available tools when needed. If a tool is needed, choose exactly one tool and wait for its ToolMessage before deciding whether another tool is needed. Never request multiple tools in the same response.
请在 docs 目录中检索与 Agent 工具调用有关的文档，读取最相关的文档，提炼三条中文要点，并将总结转换为 Markdown 文件保存。
